reason: Verified that the QA-20260714-231338-8yke agent successfully receives messages and responds correctly with the expected answer to a simple math question.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Successfully loaded the Gamut app with sidebar visible showing agents list.
Found and clicked on "QA-20260714-231338-8yke" agent in sidebar — Successfully navigated to agent page, agent landing screen displayed.
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status shows "idle" which is an acceptable status for the test.
Typed and sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message successfully submitted, navigated to chat session view with title "Simple Math Question Session".
Waited for agent response (max 3 minutes) — Response received within reasonable time (approximately 1 second as shown in the "Worked for 1s" indicator).
Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — Response clearly displays "4" as the answer to 2+2, screenshot captured successfully showing complete conversation.
